name: Apparatus Erosion Map
pitch: Images erode organically based on a Perlin noise field driven by scroll progress, revealing layers below with textured weathering patterns and active edge glowing.

lifecycle.idle: Static state of the current fully-exposed image stratum
lifecycle.discovery: Staggered load-in of initial frames with subtle fabric noise overlay fading in
lifecycle.buildUp: Progressive scroll initiates Perlin noise threshold dither, eating away pixel columns
lifecycle.peak: Complete erosion of the top stratum, revealing the next layer in full clarity
lifecycle.recovery: Reverse scroll sweeps and restores the eroded pixels back to their layout place
